creator: bossic@ngs.ru
text:
Hi! I have a problem when try to assembly the "Zend Optimizer". It wants php52 port. I had deinstall current version of php and then had try to install software from port php52. It was OK. But I need most of extensions for php. And in this step a have a big problem. Most of dependeces wasn't assembly. I have many errors. Any errors was solved when I had install any port from hands. But now I have no idea how to solve this problem:
configure: error: conditional "HAVE_GTK_2_16" was never defined.
Usually this means the macro was only invoked conditionally.
===>  Script "configure" failed unexpectedly.
Please run the gnomelogalyzer, available from
"http://www.freebsd.org/gnome/gnomelogalyzer.sh", which will diagnose the
problem and suggest a solution. If - and only if - the gnomelogalyzer cannot
solve the problem, report the build failure to the FreeBSD GNOME team at
gnome@FreeBSD.org, and attach (a)
It's incoming when assembly /usr/ports/x11-toolkits/py-gtk2.
I had try to run gnomelogalyzer.sh, and nothing.
What can I do now?
Best regards, ornicum.

How-To-Repeat: Try to "make install clean" in /usr/ports/lang/php52-extensions with all flags in "make config"
